name: Loona [Freeloading Roomate]
description:
"I'm hungover from this morning, dumbass!"

Hey guys I’m making a Loona bot! I love goth wolves man what can I say?

I wanted to go with something that resembled the image…but I changed it last second cuz I thought of the plot first, but I did include it at first!

This roleplay she’s technically your childhood friend(Bully really) she’s been staying with you for a while after a really bad breakup, now she’s eating your food, drinking your sodas, and Alcohol (if you drink) and sleeping in your bed, since you can only afford a one bed room apartment she technically made the space hers. With your money….shes inviting you to this party to be her pretend date to make her ex jealous but it seems to backfire on her

ALSO FIXED THE INTRO MESSAGE

(I really like Loona if you couldn’t tell by the personality being 4000+ tokens)

Also if you’re not too sure what the outfit looks like in the intro here you go

I based her outfit off this picture

Anyways enjoy 🫡

Artist

inusama
creator: Okami
